summary: Added bootstrap_task_order_section() to generate-task-order.sh that idempotently inserts ## Task Order before ## Tasks (or at EOF) when missing. Wired call before replace_section() in update mode. Fixed a pipefail safety bug (added || true to grep pipeline) discovered during verification.

artifacts.summary: Implementation summary covering the bootstrap function, || true pipefail fix, all 5 verification tests passed
Added bootstrap_task_order_section() function and wired it before replace_section() in update mode
